title: Updates from a form submitted has profile images of who created the form
excerpt:

posts.author: andyoungy (Andy Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Suggested Change, apologies if this has come up before or it being worked on already.

I have noticed that when a form is submitted and when there are ‘notes’ which populate the Updates section of the item the little profile picture against the note is the person that created the form.

I have forms that are being completed by everyone other than me, but my face appears on every note on every form so it gets a little confusing and people think I have added the notes manually after the form submitted.

Would be great to have a generic images on those updates that come from a form, so a Monday.com logo or the automation icon?

Thanks

posts.author: abbygettys (Abby)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey, Andy! Did you find a fix to this? I’m also experiencing this issue.
